testcase.name: Admin Integration Tests > GET /api/admin/analytics > returns dashboard analytics for admin

Admin Integration Tests > GET /api/admin/analytics > returns 401 without auth

Admin Integration Tests > GET /api/admin/programs > returns 403 for non-admin

AI Integration Tests > POST /api/ai/course-recommendation > returns empty recommendations when no match

AI Integration Tests > POST /api/ai/skill-gap-analysis > returns 401 without auth

Assignments Integration Tests > GET /api/assignments/:id > returns assignment by ID
Assignments Integration Tests > GET /api/assignments/:id > returns 404 when not found

Assignments Integration Tests > POST /api/assignments > creates assignment as mentor
Assignments Integration Tests > POST /api/assignments > returns 403 for student
Assignments Integration Tests > PATCH /api/assignments/:id > updates assignment when authenticated
Assignments Integration Tests > PATCH /api/assignments/:id > returns 401 without auth

Assignments Integration Tests > POST /api/assignments/submit > returns 401 without auth
Assignments Integration Tests > GET /api/assignments/submissions (shadowed by :id) > returns 404 because /:id route matches first
Auth Integration Tests > POST /api/auth/register > registers a new user with all fields
Auth Integration Tests > POST /api/auth/register > registers with minimal required fields
Auth Integration Tests > POST /api/auth/register > sets custom claims for role
Auth Integration Tests > POST /api/auth/login > logs in with valid email
Auth Integration Tests > POST /api/auth/login > returns user data with name
Auth Integration Tests > POST /api/auth/google > authenticates with Google ID token
Auth Integration Tests > POST /api/auth/google > creates new user if not exists
Auth Integration Tests > POST /api/auth/logout > logs out successfully
Auth Integration Tests > POST /api/auth/forgot-password > sends password reset email
Auth Integration Tests > POST /api/auth/reset-password > resets password with valid code
Auth Integration Tests > POST /api/auth/send-otp > sends OTP to valid phone
Auth Integration Tests > POST /api/auth/verify-otp > verifies correct OTP
Auth Integration Tests > POST /api/auth/verify-otp > rejects incorrect OTP

Auth Integration Tests > GET /api/auth/me > returns 401 when not authenticated
Auth Integration Tests > GET /api/auth/me > returns 404 when user not found

Auth Integration Tests > PATCH /api/auth/profile > updates profile with optional fields
Auth Integration Tests > PATCH /api/auth/profile > returns 401 without auth

Enrollments Integration Tests > DELETE /api/enrollments/:id > returns 403 for non-admin

Placements Integration Tests > PATCH /api/jobs/applications/:id > returns 403 for student
